OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The token of the user who represents the connector in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope defines the set of entity types that the enrichment connector is allowed to process.

CONNECTOR_TYPE.description: Should always be set to INTERNAL_ENRICHMENT for this connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enables or disables automatic enrichment of observables for OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL.description: The confidence level for this connector, from 0 (Unknown) to 100 (Fully trusted).

JOE_SANDBOX_API_KEY.description: API key used to authenticate requests to the Joe Sandbox service.

JOE_SANDBOX_API_URL.description: The Joe Sandbox API URL. Cloud Pro: https://jbxcloud.joesecurity.org/api, Cloud Basic: https://joesandbox.com/api.

JOE_SANDBOX_ANALYSIS_URL.description: The Joe Sandbox analysis URL. Cloud Pro: https://jbxcloud.joesecurity.org/analysis, Cloud Basic: https://joesandbox.com/analysis.

JOE_SANDBOX_ACCEPT_TAC.description: If true, you accept the Joe Sandbox Terms and Conditions at https://jbxcloud.joesecurity.org/tandc.

JOE_SANDBOX_API_TIMEOUT.description: Time in seconds to timeout after calling the Joe Sandbox API.

JOE_SANDBOX_VERIFY_SSL.description: Verify SSL certificates for API calls.

JOE_SANDBOX_API_RETRIES.description: How many times to retry API calls before giving up.

JOE_SANDBOX_PROXIES.description: A JSON encoded map of proxies to use for API calls. See https://requests.readthedocs.io/en/latest/user/advanced/?highlight=proxy#proxies.

JOE_SANDBOX_USER_AGENT.description: The user agent string sent with API requests to Joe Sandbox.

JOE_SANDBOX_REPORT_TYPES.description: Comma-separated list of report types to download/upload as external reference files.

JOE_SANDBOX_SYSTEMS.description: Comma-separated list of analysis systems to use.

JOE_SANDBOX_ANALYSIS_TIME.description: Timeout for the analysis in seconds.

JOE_SANDBOX_INTERNET_ACCESS.description: Enable full internet access in the analysis (must be false if internet simulation is true).

JOE_SANDBOX_INTERNET_SIMULATION.description: Enable internet simulation (must be false if internet access is true).

JOE_SANDBOX_REPORT_CACHE.description: Enable the report cache. Check the cache for existing reports before running a full analysis.

JOE_SANDBOX_AMSI_UNPACKING.description: Perform generic unpacking using the Microsoft Antimalware Scan Interface (AMSI).

JOE_SANDBOX_VBA_INSTRUMENTATION.description: Enable VBA instrumentation (two analyses are performed).

JOE_SANDBOX_JS_INSTRUMENTATION.description: Enable Javascript instrumentation (two analyses are performed).

JOE_SANDBOX_JAVA_JAR_TRACING.description: Enable JAVA JAR tracing (two analyses are performed).

JOE_SANDBOX_START_AS_NORMAL_USER.description: Starts the sample with normal user privileges.

JOE_SANDBOX_SYSTEM_DATE.description: Change the analyzer's system date (helpful for date-aware samples), format is YYYY-MM-DD.

JOE_SANDBOX_LANGUAGE_AND_LOCALE.description: Changes the language and locale of the analysis machine.

JOE_SANDBOX_LOCALIZED_INTERNET_COUNTRY.description: Select the country to use for routing internet access through.

JOE_SANDBOX_EMAIL_NOTIFICATION.description: Enable email notification upon analysis completion.

JOE_SANDBOX_ARCHIVE_NO_UNPACK.description: Do not unpack archives (zip, 7z etc) containing multiple files.

JOE_SANDBOX_FAST_MODE.description: Fast Mode focuses on fast analysis and detection versus deep forensic analysis.

JOE_SANDBOX_SECONDARY_RESULTS.description: Enables secondary results such as Yara rule generation, classification via Joe Sandbox Class as well as several detail reports.

JOE_SANDBOX_COOKBOOK_FILE_PATH.description: Path to a cookbook to run for the analysis.

JOE_SANDBOX_DOCUMENT_PASSWORD.description: Password for decrypting documents like MS Office and PDFs.

JOE_SANDBOX_ARCHIVE_PASSWORD.description: This password will be used to decrypt archives (zip, 7z, rar etc.).

JOE_SANDBOX_COMMAND_LINE_ARGUMENT.description: Will start the sample with the given command-line argument. Currently only available on Windows analyzers.

JOE_SANDBOX_ENCRYPT_WITH_PASSWORD.description: Encryption password for analyses, AES-256 is used to encrypt files and the password is deleted on the backend after encrypting files.

JOE_SANDBOX_BROWSER.description: Use a browser for analysis of URLs (false means download/execute).

JOE_SANDBOX_URL_REPUTATION.description: Lookup the reputation of URLs and domains to improve the analysis. This option will send URLs and domains to third party services and WHOIS servers.

JOE_SANDBOX_EXPORT_TO_JBXVIEW.description: Export the report(s) from this analysis to Joe Sandbox View.

JOE_SANDBOX_DELETE_AFTER_DAYS.description: Delete the analysis after the specified number of days. If not set, the default value is used.

JOE_SANDBOX_PRIORITY.description: On-premise exclusive parameter. Set the priority of the submission between 1 and 10 (high value means higher priority).

JOE_SANDBOX_DEFAULT_TLP.description: The default TLP for newly created STIX objects.

JOE_SANDBOX_YARA_COLOR.description: The color for yara labels applied to the observable.
